narrative:
Precinct Zanesville 1-A (precinct in Muskingum County) has 852 registered voters, with 71.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 13.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.9%, a narrow Democratic lean of 1.5 percentage points.
